Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 5.1 cm x 1.6 cm x 1.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 26% slough, 74% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Alginate dressing applied.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Left buttock / Measures 5.1 cm x 1.6 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
